title: SystemVerilog loop-controll support (break, continue)
body:
Hi,

it would be greate to have SystemVerilog's loop-control statements suporrted by iverilog.

The following gives the feedback `break_example.sv:8: sorry: break statements not supported.`:
```systemverilog
module break_example;
integer i;
initial begin
  for( integer i=0; i < 5; i=i+1 ) begin
    $display( "%d\n", i);
    if (i==2) begin
      break;
    end
  end
end
endmodule
```

This example responds `break_example.sv:8: error: malformed statement`:
```systemverilog
module continue_example;
integer i;
initial begin
  integer i;
  for( i=0; i < 5; i=i+1 ) begin
    $display( "%d\n", i);
    if (i==2) begin
      continue;
    end
  end
end
endmodule
```


Icarus Verilog version 11.0 (devel) (s20150603-536-gca013857)
